title: lathyros clymenus
intro: Lathyros clymenus, also known as Mecon or Wild-horse radish, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its ability to stimulate the lymphatic system and increase urine production, making it a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Lathyros clymenus include its use in treating kidney stones, edema, and other urinary tract issues, as well as its potential to help with weight loss and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Lathyros clymenus is often used as a tincture, tea, or dried powder, and it can also be consumed raw in its fresh or cooked form.
